meta.tldr: This release focuses on restoring functionality and improving stability. VS Code foreground terminal support and settings have been restored, ensuring a consistent development experience. The release also adds support for the latest models from OpenAI, SAP AI Core, and Z AI, providing access to cutting-edge AI capabilities. A fix has been implemented to address hook template JSON escaping issues, preventing potential errors in custom workflows. Additionally, error handling for ripgrep file searches has been improved, enhancing the reliability of file search operations. Hardcoded model lists have been removed from the documentation, ensuring that the documentation remains up-to-date and accurate. This release is recommended for users who rely on VS Code foreground terminal support or want to leverage the latest AI models. No specific migration steps are required.

features.name: W&B Inference by CoreWeave API provider
features.description: Added W&B Inference by CoreWeave as a new API provider with 17 models

features.name: Parallel tool calling support
features.description: Improved parallel tool calling support for OpenRouter and Cline providers

features.name: Dynamic Free Model Detection for Cline API
features.description: Implement dynamic free model detection for Cline API

features.name: File Read Deduplication Cache
features.description: Add file read deduplication cache to prevent repeated reads

features.name: Feature Tips Tooltip During Thinking State
features.description: Add feature tips tooltip during thinking state

features.name: Latency improvements for remote workspaces
features.description: Latency improvements for remote workspaces

features.name: Cline Kanban Launch Modal
features.description: Launches Cline Kanban by default with a migration view in webview.

features.name: Disable Feature Tips Toggle
features.description: Adds a toggle to disable feature tips in chat.

features.name: Repeated Tool Call Loop Detection
features.description: Detects repeated tool call loops to prevent infinite loops and token wastage.

features.name: Lazy Teammate Mode
features.description: Adds an experimental toggle for 'Lazy Teammate Mode'.

features.name: `read_file` tool chunked reading
features.description: `read_file` tool now supports chunked reading for targeted file access

features.name: Lazy Teammate Mode experimental toggle
features.description: Adds an experimental toggle for "Lazy Teammate Mode".

features.name: Spend Limit Reached Error UI
features.description: Adds a dedicated UI to inform users when they have reached their spend limit.

features.name: Claude Opus 4.7 model support
features.description: Adds support for the Claude Opus 4.7 model.

features.name: Azure Blob Storage as a storage provider
features.description: Adds Azure Blob Storage as a supported storage provider.

features.name: globalSkills in remote config
features.description: Adds `globalSkills` to remote config.

features.name: Inline value reuse in user-level remote-config discovery
features.description: Enables inline value reuse in user-level remote-config discovery.

features.name: Enterprise Managed Global Skills
features.description: Remote `globalSkills` from enterprise remote config are now fully integrated with UI, toggle support, and system prompt integration. Enterprise-managed skills appear under a dedicated "Enterprise Skills" section and support `alwaysEnabled` enforcement.

features.name: Dynamic Recommended Models Onboarding
features.description: The onboarding flow now uses dynamically fetched recommended models instead of a hardcoded list, with a fallback to the welcome view on failure.
key_details: Falls back to welcome view on failure.

features.name: Quota Exceeded Error Message
features.description: A dedicated "Quota Exceeded" error message is now displayed in the chat error UI when Cline account spend caps are hit.
key_details: Displays a dedicated "Quota Exceeded" error message.
Appears in the chat error UI.

features.name: Enterprise Managed Global Skills UI and Remote Config
features.description: Integrates remote `globalSkills` from enterprise remote config with full UI, toggle support, and system prompt integration. Enterprise-managed skills now appear under a dedicated "Enterprise Skills" section and support `alwaysEnabled` enforcement.

features.name: Dynamic Recommended Models Onboarding Flow
features.description: The onboarding flow now uses dynamically fetched recommended models instead of a hardcoded list, with a fallback to the welcome view on failure.

features.name: Quota Exceeded Error Message in Chat UI
features.description: Adds a dedicated "Quota Exceeded" error message in the chat error UI when Cline account spend caps are hit.

features.name: Enterprise Managed Global Skills with UI and System Prompt
features.description: Wire up remote `globalSkills` from enterprise remote config with full UI, toggle support, and system prompt integration. Enterprise-managed skills now appear under a dedicated "Enterprise Skills" section and support `alwaysEnabled` enforcement.

features.name: GPT-5.5 Model Support
features.description: Adds support for the GPT-5.5 model for users with an OpenAI Codex subscription.

features.name: Restore VS Code foreground terminal support
features.description: Restores the ability to run cline in the foreground terminal of VS Code, along with associated settings.

features.name: Add latest models
features.description: Adds support for the latest models from OpenAI, SAP AI Core, and Z AI.

breaking_changes.title: Remove Foreground Terminal Mode
breaking_changes.description: Foreground terminal mode has been removed. All task command execution now defaults to background mode, removing the VS Code integrated terminal dependency and related settings UI.
breaking_changes.migration: No migration is required. All task commands will now execute in the background.
